metadata.title: Infinex — AI-Powered Margin Growth
metadata.description: Infinex transforms SMBs with AI. Strategy, deployment, training. Real results, not slide decks.

hero.title: Win the next chapter.
hero.subtitle: Your AI transformation partner.
hero.description: We set and execute your AI strategy at startup speed.

approach.sectionTitle: From insight to impact. We cover the full spectrum.
approach.sectionSubtitle: Three levers to transform your business with AI.

audit.title: Audit & Strategy
audit.description: No 6-month studies. No 200-slide decks. We audit your processes, find the quick wins, and hand you a costed action plan.

implementation.title: AI Deployment
implementation.description: Custom automations, AI tools woven into your workflow. We build, we deploy, you measure the impact.

training.title: Training & Adoption
training.description: Your teams trained on the best AI tools. Practical workshops for lasting, self-sufficient adoption.

valueProp.statement: You have a choice. Embrace AI now. Or watch your competitors do it first.

items.quote: We used to spend so much time on admin. Now it's handled, and my teams can finally focus on what drives revenue.
items.author: Jeremy

items.quote: We'd been doing everything manually for years. Once it was automated, we wondered why we hadn't done it sooner.
items.author: Xavier

items.quote: What really changed is that everyone on the team now knows how to use AI daily. It unlocked something.
items.author: Gabriel

items.question: How does it actually work?
items.answer: We start with a process audit. We identify quick wins and deploy the first automations. Results come fast.

items.question: What results can I expect?
items.answer: Our clients cut admin overhead, boost productivity, and see ROI within weeks. Every project is measured.

items.question: What kind of business is this for?
items.answer: SMBs with 5 to 200 employees, any industry. If you have repetitive processes, we can help.

items.question: How much does it cost?
items.answer: Every project is different. We offer a free initial conversation to understand your needs and provide a precise quote.

items.question: How is Infinex different from other consultancies?
items.answer: We don't sell advice, we deliver results. No slide decks, no jargon. We deploy, you measure.

items.question: How quickly will I see results?
items.answer: First gains are visible within 3 weeks. Full ROI typically arrives in under 2 months.

finalCta.title: Stay on the right side of history.
finalCta.subtitle: The time to act is now.

getStarted.metaDescription: Contact Infinex to transform your business with AI.
getStarted.title: Ready to transform your business?
getStarted.subtitle: From AI audits to full-scale deployment, we guide you every step of the way.

benefits.title: Tailored AI strategy
benefits.description: An action plan built for your business, not a one-size-fits-all template.

benefits.title: Rapid deployment
benefits.description: First results in 3 weeks, not 6 months.

benefits.title: Self-sufficient teams
benefits.description: Hands-on training so your people master AI in their daily work.

privacy.metaDescription: Privacy policy and data protection for the infinex.studio website.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy

controller.title: Data Controller
controller.content:
EI Meidy BAFFOU
SIRET: 80473268300045
Email: contact@makeitglobal-agency.com

dataCollected.title: Data Collected
dataCollected.content: We only collect data that you submit through our contact form: first name, last name, email, phone number, company, job title, revenue range, and services of interest. No data is collected automatically beyond standard server logs.

purpose.title: Purpose of Processing
purpose.content: Your data is used to respond to your inquiries, follow up for commercial purposes, and improve our services. We never sell, rent, or share your data with third parties for commercial purposes.

storage.title: Data Hosting and Storage
storage.content: The website is hosted by Vercel Inc. (USA). Form submissions are stored in Google Sheets (Google LLC, USA) for commercial follow-up and transmitted via Telegram Bot API for internal notifications. These services comply with GDPR through Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs).

retention.title: Data Retention
retention.content: Your data is retained for the duration of the business relationship and for a maximum of 3 years after the last contact. You may request deletion at any time.

rights.title: Your Rights (GDPR)
rights.content: Under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have the right to access, rectify, delete, port, and object to the processing of your personal data. To exercise your rights, contact us at contact@makeitglobal-agency.com.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.content: This website does not use advertising cookies or third-party trackers. Only strictly necessary technical cookies may be used for the website to function properly.

thirdParty.title: Third-Party Services
thirdParty.content: The website uses Google Analytics for audience measurement. This data is anonymized and cannot be used to personally identify you. You can disable tracking through your browser settings.

terms.metaDescription: Terms and conditions of use for the infinex.studio website.
terms.title: Terms of Use

object.title: Purpose
object.content: These Terms of Use govern access to and use of the infinex.studio website, published by EI Meidy BAFFOU (SIRET: 80473268300045). By using this website, you fully accept these terms.

services.title: Services Description
services.content: Infinex provides AI consulting services for SMBs: AI audit and strategy, automation deployment, and team training. The website allows you to discover our offerings, read our articles, and contact us through the dedicated form.

access.title: Website Access
access.content: The website is freely accessible to any user with an Internet connection. The publisher reserves the right to suspend or interrupt access for maintenance or updates, without prior notice or compensation.

ip.title: Intellectual Property
ip.content: All content on this website (text, images, logos, graphics, videos) is protected by intellectual property law. Any unauthorized reproduction or use is prohibited.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.content: The publisher strives to provide accurate information on the website. However, it cannot be held liable for errors, omissions, or results obtained from using this information. The website is provided "as is" without warranty of any kind.

modifications.title: Changes to Terms
modifications.content: The publisher reserves the right to modify these Terms at any time. Changes take effect upon publication on the website. Continued use of the website after modification constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

law.title: Applicable Law
law.content: These Terms are governed by French law. Any dispute relating to the use of the website shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Paris, France.
